text:
Bonnie is a soldier of the Survey Corps. She is a protagonist of the Attack on Titan motion comic "Bergheim."

Appearance

Bonnie has dark skin, brown eyes, and dark hair tied in a ponytail. She wears glasses and the standard Survey Corps uniform with a green cloak and white clothes.

Story

At night, Bonnie heads to Bergheim with Sylvia Krieger. As they are about to reach the town, Bonnie is attacked by a Titan. Sylvia goes to kill it but it disappears before.

They come in Bergheim and Bonnie wonders if the peculiar atmosphere of the town did not make the Titan flee. The two women then begin to look for Sylvia's brother, Lucas. Noticing some smoke, Bonnie proposes to carefully follow it. The smoke comes from an abandoned house where they find some food. Sylvia thinks of eating it, supposing her brother made it but Bonnie disagrees, believing that it is a trap.

Bonnie goes out to take some water and find berries. She takes some and brings them to Sylvia, who had fallen asleep. She energetically wakes her up, fearing she was dead. Bonnie then proposes to go up and take the first watch.

As she is eating berries, Bonnie notices some light and warns a sleepy Sylvia, spotting a seemingly glowing Titan.
